sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n442" key="a)gelhtro/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγελ-ητρόφος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n442.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">horse-keeper</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:181" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.181</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀγελο-</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
